title: Cricket’s House on Jaya
description: The Straw Hats meet Mont Blanc Cricket and the Saruyama Alliance, whose lives are tied to the legend of Noland and the search for sky.
scene: Across pages 3, 4, 5, 6, this scene centers on Mont Blanc Cricket, Masira, Chopper, Bellamy, Luffy. The Straw Hats meet Mont Blanc Cricket and the Saruyama Alliance, whose lives are tied to the legend of Noland and the search for sky.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: What's with those wounds!? What happened!?

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: I've HAD IT with that subject!

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: And the whole bar exploded in laughter...

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: Did I really say something that funny!?

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: Just let her be for now...

summary: The Straw Hats meet Mont Blanc Cricket and the Saruyama Alliance, whose lives are tied to the legend of Noland and the search for sky.
